sourceRefs.fallbackText: The A module is the perception layer. It cleans visible text, preserves paragraph identifiers, and marks source references for every downstream digest item.

sourceRefs.fallbackText: According to the V1.2 plan, high-signal output must include source coverage, grounding completeness, jumpback coverage, and a deterministic quality report.

sourceRefs.fallbackText: First, the page is converted into structured paragraphs. Second, noisy navigation and recommendation blocks are filtered. Third, grounded facts are distilled for D and C modules.
